betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Firebox & Heating Oven§f

§aTwo heat sources that burn solid fuel to produce TU for stirling engines, crucibles, and other heat-hungry machines.§f

§6Firebox§f
Crafted at Tier 2 anvil from: furnace, steel plates ×8, red copper ×8.
Burns fuel slowly at full efficiency. Safe for stirling engines (below 300 TU/t).

§6Heating Oven§f
Crafted at Tier 2 anvil from: firebrick ×16, steel plates ×4, red copper ×8.
Produces 5× the heat, 8× faster but less fuel-efficient. Base output of 500 TU/t WILL overspeed a standard stirling — use the heavy stirling.
Can receive heat from below (halved) — stack multiple for crucible-level heat.

§6Fuel Bonuses§f:
§b• Coal/Lignite/Coke§f: +25% time, +100% heat
§b• Solid Fuel§f: +50% time, +200% heat
§b• Rocket Fuel§f: +50% time, +400% heat
§b• Balefire§f: -50% time, +1400% heat

Both conserve fuel when heat buffer is full.

§eTip§f: Use a firebox for stirling engines and a heating oven (or stacked ovens) for crucibles.
